heading: North Atlantic Assembly; appropriations for expenses of annual meeting
label: 1928e North Atlantic Assembly; appropriations for expenses of annual meeting
text: In addition to the amounts authorized by , there is authorized to be appropriated $50,000 for fiscal year 1977 to meet the expenses incurred by the United States group in hosting the twenty-second annual meeting of the North Atlantic Assembly. In addition to amounts authorized by , there is authorized to be appropriated $550,000 for fiscal year 1994 to meet the expenses incurred by the United States group in hosting the fortieth annual meeting of the North Atlantic Assembly. In addition to the amounts authorized by , there is authorized to be appropriated $450,000 for fiscal year 1984 to meet the expenses incurred by the United States group in hosting the thirty-first annual meeting of the North Atlantic Assembly. Amounts appropriated under this section are authorized to remain available until expended.section 1928b of this titlesection 1928b of this titlesection 1928b of this title
notes: CodificationThis section was not enacted as part of the Mutual Security Act of 1954 which comprises this chapter.

Amendments1991— inserted after first sentence provisions authorizing appropriation of $550,000 for fiscal year 1994 to meet expenses of the United States group in hosting the fortieth annual meeting of the North Atlantic Assembly.Pub. L. 102–1381983— inserted provisions authorizing additional appropriations for fiscal year 1984 to meet the expenses of hosting the annual meeting.Pub. L. 98–164

Change of NameReference to North Atlantic Assembly considered to be reference to NATO Parliamentary Assembly, see section 1000(a)(7) [div. A, title VII, § 701(b)(3)] of , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 106–113section 1928b of this title
